patches_added.name: Hide Video/OTT tab
patches_added.description: Hides the Video/OTT download tab from the home screen by forcing its visibility flag to always report disabled.

patches_added.name: Redirect avatar click to Settings
patches_added.description: Makes the top-right avatar open Settings directly instead of the Me/Profile tab.

patches_added.name: Hide music action buttons
patches_added.description: Adds options to hide action buttons under the player.

patches_added.name: Force Active Subscription
patches_added.description: Patches Dart AOT-compiled libapp.so to force the active_subscription field in the /profile response deserializer to always be true. Replaces `ldur x1, [x29, -8]` (load parsed JSON active value) with `add x1, x22, #0x20` (load Dart `true` object) at the StoreField instruction in ActiveSubscription.fromJson.
